process.commandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /c "cd /d C:\temp\wxc_test_gitexisting & echo HACKED> .git\config 2>nul & (type .git\config 2>nul | findstr HACKED >nul) && (echo LEAK:config_overwritten&exit 1) || (echo OK:config_write_denied) & echo x> parent_ok.txt & if exist parent_ok.txt (echo OK:parent_write) else (echo FAIL:parent_write&exit 1) & exit 0"
